subject: Double charged for my subscription
message: Hi, I was billed twice for my monthly subscription payment this month. My invoice shows two identical charges. Can you look into this billing issue and let me know what happens next?

subject: App keeps crashing on startup
message: The application crashes with an error every time I try to load it. It was working yesterday but now it is completely broken and I cannot use it. Please help me fix this bug.

subject: Locked out of my account
message: I cannot log in. My password reset link is not working and my account seems locked after several sign in attempts. I need to regain access to my account.

subject: Where is my delivery
message: My package was supposed to arrive last week. The tracking has not updated and the courier shows no delivery date. When will my order ship and arrive?

subject: Extremely unhappy - considering legal action
message: This is absolutely unacceptable. Your service has cost me money and nobody responds. I am angry and I am considering contacting my lawyer and taking legal action. I want this escalated to a manager immediately.

subject: No puedo acceder a mi cuenta
message: Hola, no puedo iniciar sesion en mi cuenta y necesito ayuda urgente para recuperar el acceso. Mi contrasena no funciona.
